name: Pralines (L.a. Times)
recipeInstructions:
1 Mix sugar and milk together in a heavy saucepan.
2 Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches 236 degrees on a candy thermometer.
3 Remove the mixture from the heat. Add butter and vanilla. Beat until creamy with slight shine, but still thin.
4 Add coconut. Stir well to evenly distribute the coconut.
5 Drop pralines by spoonfuls onto greased foil or marble slab.
6 Let stand to harden.
7 When hardened, pralines can be stored in tins.
Each praline contains about: 137 calories; 16 mg sodium; 4 mg cholesterol; 3 grams fat; 27 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0.28 gram fiber.
